sections.subtitle: Recent Form
sections.text: Deportivo Alavés is struggling at the bottom of the table, having secured only 4 points from their last five matches. Real Betis, on the other hand, is in good form, sitting 6th in the league and accumulating 11 points from their last five games.

sections.subtitle: Head-to-Head Stats
sections.text: In their last two encounters, Real Betis has won both matches, including a recent 1-0 victory at home. Alavés has managed just one win in their last five head-to-head matches against Betis.

sections.subtitle: Key Players
sections.text: For Alavés, Raúl Fernández has been the standout performer recently, suggesting a potential key impact in goal. Betis relies on creative players like Pablo Fornals and Antony, who are crucial in orchestrating their attacking play.

sections.subtitle: Tactical Insights
sections.text: Alavés will need to stabilize their defense, which currently concedes an average of 2 goals per match, while Betis must exploit their superior attacking capabilities and ball possession.

halftimeSections.subtitle: First half summary
halftimeSections.text: The first half concluded with Deportivo Alavés leading Real Betis 1-0, thanks to an early goal from Carlos Vicente in the 3rd minute. The home team started strong, demonstrating high energy and creating multiple opportunities.

halftimeSections.subtitle: Attack momentum analysis
halftimeSections.text: Deportivo Alavés dominated the opening stages, particularly in the first 30 minutes, with significant momentum shifts that reflected their offensive intent. However, Real Betis managed to stabilize as the first half progressed, showing more defensive resilience and gradually shifting the momentum in their favor towards the end of the half.

halftimeSections.subtitle: Team performance overview
halftimeSections.text: Alavés' defense was solid, limiting Betis to only a few clear chances despite their greater possession. The away team's inability to capitalize on big opportunities could be a concern going into the second half. Conversely, Alavés displayed effective attacking play but could improve on their finishing.

halftimeSections.subtitle: Predicted adjustments
halftimeSections.text: Both teams may make tactical adjustments to influence the game's flow in the second half. Alavés might focus on solidifying their lead through strong defensive play while looking for counter-attacking chances, whereas Betis could be more aggressive, searching for an equalizer.

halftimeSections.subtitle: Second half expectations
halftimeSections.text: As the match progresses, we can expect Real Betis to increase their attacking pressure. If they manage to convert their chances, the second half could see a change in the lead. On the other hand, if Alavés can remain defensive and effectively manage the game's pace, they might hold onto their advantage.
